requirement_topic.en: Formaldehyde Emission from Wood-Based Panels — REACH Annex XVII Entry 77
requirement_topic.zh: 木基板材甲醛释放——REACH附件XVII第77条
requirement_topic.zht: 木基板材甲醛釋放——REACH附件XVII第77條

summary.en: Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/1464 introduced Entry 77 into REACH Annex XVII, restricting articles where formaldehyde release exceeds 0.062 mg/m³ of air for furniture and wood-based articles. The restriction applies from 6 August 2026 for furniture and other relevant articles. The REACH restriction is the mandatory legal obligation; EN 717-1 and EN ISO 12460-5 are recognised technical methods for demonstrating emissions where appropriate, not standalone market-access obligations. Articles placed on the EU market must not exceed the REACH limit, and economic operators must be able to demonstrate compliance.
summary.zh: 欧盟委员会法规(EU) 2023/1464在REACH附件XVII中新增第77条，限制家具和木基物品甲醛释放量超过0.062 mg/m³空气的物品。该限制自2026年8月6日起适用于家具及其他相关物品。强制性法律义务来自REACH限制本身；EN 717-1和EN ISO 12460-5是在适当情况下用于证明释放量的认可技术方法，并非独立的市场准入义务。投放欧盟市场的物品不得超过REACH限值，经营者须能证明合规性。
summary.zht: 歐盟委員會法規(EU) 2023/1464在REACH附件XVII中新增第77條，限制家具和木基物品甲醛釋放量超過0.062 mg/m³空氣的物品。該限制自2026年8月6日起適用於家具及其他相關物品。強制性法律義務來自REACH限制本身；EN 717-1和EN ISO 12460-5是在適當情況下用於證明釋放量的認可技術方法，並非獨立的市場准入義務。投放歐盟市場的物品不得超過REACH限值，經營者須能證明合規性。

standards_or_laws: REACH Regulation (EC) No 1907/2006, Annex XVII Entry 77 (as amended by Commission Regulation (EU) 2023/1464)
EN 717-1 — Wood-based panels — Determination of formaldehyde release — Part 1: Formaldehyde emission by the chamber method
EN ISO 12460-5 — Wood-based panels — Determination of formaldehyde release — Part 5: Extraction method (perforator method) with correlation to chamber method
EN 13986 — Wood-based panels for use in construction — Characteristics, evaluation of conformity and marking

summary.en: China's mandatory standard GB 18584-2001 (Limit of harmful substances of wood furniture in indoor decorating and refurbishing materials) sets formaldehyde emission limits for wood furniture using the 40-litre chamber method. The standard specifies E1 class: ≤1.5 mg/L by perforator method, or ≤0.12 mg/m³ by climate chamber method. GB 18584 is a mandatory GB (强制性国标) administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment / SAMR. Note: China's E1 limit (chamber: 0.12 mg/m³) is less stringent than the EU limit (0.062 mg/m³); Chinese-compliant furniture may still fail the EU REACH limit. A revised GB 18584 (GB 18584-2024) has been issued and may apply from 2025 — exporters should verify the current effective date.
summary.zh: 中国强制性国家标准GB 18584-2001（室内装饰装修材料——木家具中有害物质限量）采用40升气候箱法规定木家具甲醛释放限量。该标准规定E1级：穿孔萃取法≤1.5 mg/L，或气候箱法≤0.12 mg/m³。GB 18584为强制性国标，由生态环境部/市场监管总局管理。注意：中国E1限值（气候箱法：0.12 mg/m³）比欧盟限值（0.062 mg/m³）宽松；符合中国标准的家具仍可能不满足欧盟REACH限值。修订版GB 18584-2024已发布，可能自2025年起实施——出口商应核实当前生效日期。
summary.zht: 中國強制性國家標準GB 18584-2001（室內裝飾裝修材料——木家具中有害物質限量）採用40升氣候箱法規定木家具甲醛釋放限量。該標準規定E1級：穿孔萃取法≤1.5 mg/L，或氣候箱法≤0.12 mg/m³。GB 18584為強制性國標，由生態環境部/市場監管總局管理。注意：中國E1限值（氣候箱法：0.12 mg/m³）比歐盟限值（0.062 mg/m³）寬鬆；符合中國標準的家具仍可能不滿足歐盟REACH限值。修訂版GB 18584-2024已發布，可能自2025年起實施——出口商應核實當前生效日期。

standards_or_laws: GB 18584-2001 — Limit of harmful substances of wood furniture in indoor decorating and refurbishing materials (mandatory GB, SAMR/MEE)

gap.en: The EU REACH limit of 0.062 mg/m³ is approximately half of China's 0.12 mg/m³ GB 18584 E1 limit. Furniture manufactured to Chinese E1 class may still exceed the EU REACH threshold. Exporters should obtain evidence generated under the REACH-recognised emissions methods, such as EN 717-1 or EN ISO 12460-5 where appropriate, from an accredited laboratory; Chinese GB 18584 test reports to the perforator or Chinese chamber method are not directly equivalent. Testing gap: the test protocols and correction factors differ. Documentation needed: emissions evidence, traceability to panel batch, and economic operator records.
gap.zh: 欧盟REACH限值0.062 mg/m³约为中国GB 18584 E1限值0.12 mg/m³的一半。按中国E1级生产的家具仍可能超过欧盟REACH阈值。出口商应从认可实验室取得按REACH认可释放量方法形成的证据，例如在适当情况下使用EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5；依据穿孔萃取法或中国气候箱法出具的GB 18584检测报告与欧盟要求不直接等同。检测差距：检测方案及换算系数存在差异。所需文件：释放量证据、板材批次可追溯性记录及经营者档案。
gap.zht: 歐盟REACH限值0.062 mg/m³約為中國GB 18584 E1限值0.12 mg/m³的一半。按中國E1級生產的家具仍可能超過歐盟REACH閾值。出口商應從認可實驗室取得按REACH認可釋放量方法形成的證據，例如在適當情況下使用EN 717-1或EN ISO 12460-5；依據穿孔萃取法或中國氣候箱法出具的GB 18584檢測報告與歐盟要求不直接等同。檢測差距：檢測方案及換算系數存在差異。所需文件：釋放量證據、板材批次可追溯性記錄及經營者檔案。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — REACH Annex XVII Entry 77 applies to furniture and wood-based articles placed on the EU market; the 0.062 mg/m³ legal limit applies from 6 August 2026; EN 717-1 and EN ISO 12460-5 are technical evidence methods, not independent mandatory standards
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18584-2001 (or revised GB 18584-2024 when effective) is a mandatory national standard for wood furniture sold in China

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] REACH Annex XVII Entry 77 sets a mandatory formaldehyde release limit of 0.062 mg/m³ for furniture and wood-based articles, applying from 6 August 2026. This limit is stricter than China's GB 18584 E1 class (0.12 mg/m³). Chinese E1-certified furniture may not meet the EU limit. EN 717-1 and EN ISO 12460-5 are recognised technical methods for evidence where appropriate; the legal obligation is the REACH limit.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] REACH附件XVII第77条规定，家具和木基物品甲醛释放强制限值为0.062 mg/m³，自2026年8月6日起适用。该限值比中国GB 18584 E1级（0.12 mg/m³）更严格。通过中国E1认证的家具可能不满足欧盟限值。EN 717-1和EN ISO 12460-5是在适当情况下用于证据的认可技术方法；法律义务来自REACH限值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] REACH附件XVII第77條規定，家具和木基物品甲醛釋放強制限值為0.062 mg/m³，自2026年8月6日起適用。該限值比中國GB 18584 E1級（0.12 mg/m³）更嚴格。通過中國E1認證的家具可能不滿足歐盟限值。EN 717-1和EN ISO 12460-5是在適當情況下用於證據的認可技術方法；法律義務來自REACH限值。
